headline: TD Cowen Maintains Buy on Nasdaq, Lowers Price Target to $98
summary: TD Cowen  analyst Bill Katz   maintains Nasdaq (NASDAQ:NDAQ) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $104 to $98.
